title: The Resonance Phenomenon
summary: The page finishes a pulse-transmission example by computing the system time constant, rise time, cutoff frequency, and resulting maximum pulse transmission rate for a lowpass system with impulse response h(t)=te^{-t}u(t). It then begins subsection 2.6-7 on resonance, introducing a first-order system with impulse response Ae^{\lambda t} and an input e^{(\lambda-\epsilon)t} to motivate the resonance phenomenon.
